_notes.purpose: Piccoma 動画リワード (video-reward) channel — users watch ads to earn unlock-currency.
raw_files: 動画リワード_株式会社RIVERSE_{YYYYMM}.xlsx (main)
動画リワード_株式会社RIVERSE_砂時計_{YYYYMM}.xlsx (sibling, single product)
_notes.tax_rules: raw sales & pay are tax-INCLUSIVE. GT uses: after_tax = round_half_up(sum/1.10); before_tax = round_half_up(after_tax*1.10); consumption_tax = floor(income*0.10); before_tax_income = consumption_tax + income.

sheets.daily_log: 動画リワード_株式会社RIVERSE

daily_log_columns.3: 作品名 — GROUP KEY (used as channel_title_jp / title_jp)
daily_log_columns.5: 動画リワード使用件数
daily_log_columns.6: 売上金額（税込） — per row, uses × 1.43
daily_log_columns.8: 精算金額(税込み) — per row, sales × 0.25
